_meta.null_signal_reason: Weekly research bundle contains 12 developments primarily on US democratic backsliding.

lead_signal.headline: V-Dem downgrades USA to electoral democracy, first time in 50+ years
lead_signal.body: V-Dem Institute's 2026 report classified the United States as an electoral democracy rather than liberal democracy for the first time in over 50 years, describing 2025 as unprecedented speed of democratic dismantlement. Multiple Tier 2 sources including Century Foundation and Freedom House confirm worsening across elections, judiciary, civil society, and press pillars. Reasoner recommends severity upgrade to 6.5 based on corroborated evidence.
